item.title: Video 1 - I built a simple 3D-Printed Robot Gripper with Raspberry Pi (Beginner Friendly!)
item.description: Robotic gripper build materials — resources and video links; Wiring diagram and code.

item.title: Video 4: DIY Cheap Home Security Alarm For Beginners | Arduino Nano, PIR sensors, and SIM800L
item.description: Nano-based alarm with PIR and SIM800L — calls you on motion. Wiring, enclosure notes, and annotated code.

item.title: Video 3: How to send a message and make a phone call from Arduino with SIM800L?
item.description: Wire the SIM800L to Arduino, run communication tests, send SMS, and place a call from your sketch.

item.title: Video 2: DIY home security alarm with Arduino | PIR sensor (HC-SR501), buzzer, LED
item.description: Motion-triggered alarm with PIR HC-SR501, buzzer, and LED — wiring diagrams, PDF, and full Arduino code.

item.title: Video 1: Understanding Ultrasonic Sensor
item.description: HC-SR04 ultrasonic distance sensing — how it works, wiring, and a ready-to-run Arduino sketch.
